# ✈️ Flight Booking System (Java)

## 📌 Overview

This is a console-based Flight Booking System developed using Core Java.
The system allows users to view available flights, book seats, and process payments through a simulated payment module.

The project demonstrates strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts and menu-driven application design.

---

## 🚀 Features

* View available flights
* Seat availability tracking
* Book seats
* Payment simulation (UPI / Card / Net Banking)
* Auto-generated Transaction ID
* Input validation handling
* Menu-driven interface

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

* Java (Core Java)
* OOP Concepts
* ArrayList
* Scanner Class
* Random Class

---

## 🧠 OOP Concepts Implemented

* Classes and Objects
* Encapsulation
* Method Abstraction
* Modular Design
* Separation of Concerns

---

## 💳 Payment Module

The system includes a simulated payment processing feature:

* Multiple payment method selection
* Transaction ID generation
* Success confirmation message

(This is a simulated module and does not integrate real payment APIs.)

---

## 📂 Project Structure

Flight Booking System
│
├── Main.java
├── Flight.java
├── BookingSystem.java / Payment.java

---

## ▶️ How to Run

1. Open project in VS Code
2. Open terminal inside project folder
3. Compile:

   ```
   javac Main.java
   ```
4. Run:

   ```
   java Main
   ```

---

## 🎯 Learning Outcomes

* Practical implementation of OOP
* Handling user input safely
* Building structured console applications
* Designing modular systems
